name: carmen-analysis
updateContentCommand: pip install --user --upgrade pip && pip install --user -e '.[web,dev]' && echo '✅ carmen-analysis installed (editable, with web+dev extras)'

postAttachCommand.server: streamlit run --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false $(python -c 'import carmen_analysis.web.app as a; print(a.__file__)')
